who: kitchen managers at restaurants processing 10–20 invoices/month
offer: For kitchen managers at restaurants processing 10–20 invoices/month, invoice discrepancies cause financial losses. We monitor supplier invoices instead of manual invoice checking.
problem: Discrepancies in supplier invoices leading to financial losses.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for kitchen managers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about invoice workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 kitchen managers with demo video
Participate in forums where kitchen managers share tools
try_it: Let users try discrepancy flagging and invoice tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
Reduce steps in the onboarding process
